html:
2026-0525
2026-06-02IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActRegulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations in order to introduce an electronic travel authorization (eTA) requirement for visa exempt foreign nationals entering Canada by ferry from the French Territorial Collectivity of Saint-Pierre and Miquelon (SPM) with certain exceptions such as French national residents of Saint-Pierre and Miquelon, U.S. residents, foreign nationals arriving by Cruise Ship.Registration: SOR/2026-0101 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations
precis: Regulations Amending the Immigration and Refugee Protection Regulations in order to introduce an electronic travel authorization (eTA) requirement for visa exempt foreign nationals entering Canada by ferry from the French Territorial Collectivity of Saint-Pierre and Miquelon (SPM) with certain exceptions such as French national residents of Saint-Pierre and Miquelon, U.S. residents, foreign nationals arriving by Cruise Ship.
